content_brief.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Demand it back legally in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no signup or subscription needed.

key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 60 days
Normal wear and tear, cleaning fees without receipts, and vague 'damages' are often illegal deductions
Deposits-Back.com generates a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee
No signup, no subscription, and no attorney required to demand your deposit back
A formal letter of demand significantly increases landlord compliance and can trigger penalty payments
